prompt: Could you please add a new FS: 'The system shall provide a configurable dashboard with drag-and-drop widgets.' This is of medium priority. Also, NFS-002, 'Scalability to 1 million users', is very ambitious; could you clarify the specific metrics and load conditions that define this?

expected.addRequirement: add a new FS: 'The system shall provide a configurable dashboard with drag-and-drop widgets'.
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to Medium for the new FS regarding the configurable dashboard.
expected.clarifyRequirement: clarify the specific metrics and load conditions that define NFS-002, 'Scalability to 1 million users'.
